data.title: As a DSO maintainer, I render upstream copier template + strip nava-platform machinery
data.description:
## Description

What: Render upstream template/ via copier once (offline, by this epics implementer) and strip all nava-platform scaffolding so the forks default branch is a runnable NextJS app.
Why: Walking skeleton - produces the runnable application the installer needs. Must precede DSO infrastructure baking (S3).
Scope:
- IN: One-time copier copy invocation against upstream template/ and copier.yml with DSO-appropriate answers; commit rendered output at repo root; remove template/, template-only-bin/, template-only-docs/, copier.yml, code.json, .copier-answers.yml; remove or replace CODEOWNERS, SECURITY.md, renovate.json; DELETE any .github/workflows/*.yml that invokes nava-platform.
- OUT: DSO infrastructure files (S3); project-name placeholders (S3); tickets orphan branch (S3); NOTICE (S4).

## Done Definitions

- When complete, a grep of the tracked files for references to nava-platform, .copier-answers, copier.yml, template-only-bin, template-only-docs, or code.json returns zero hits.
  Satisfies: zero references to nava-platform tooling (SC2)
- When complete, CODEOWNERS is removed or replaced with DSO-generic content (no Nava team references); SECURITY.md replaced with DSO contact info; renovate.json removed OR DSO-customized.
  Satisfies: SC2
- When complete, any upstream .github/workflows/*.yml that invokes the nava-platform CLI is deleted (not merely edited); the .github/workflows/ directory is empty or contains only files S3 will replace. (Applied from adversarial review F3.)
  Satisfies: no workflow invokes nava-platform (SC2)
- When complete, a fresh clone runs npm install followed by npm run dev successfully with no nava-platform tooling installed.
  Satisfies: SC2 (runnable)
- When complete, unit tests written and passing for all new or modified logic.

## Considerations

- [Testing] The copier render is a one-time manual step; capture the copier answers file or a script so the render is reproducible if we need to re-render from a newer upstream.
- [Scope / USWDS] USWDS is retained from upstream for v1. Verify USWDS does not require post-clone build steps (sass compilation, webpack config, fonts) that would break npm run dev or extend SC4 10-min target. If additional setup IS needed, document it in project-understanding.md (S3) or strip USWDS in favor of plain Tailwind. (F8)

## Escalation Policy

Escalation policy: Proceed unless a significant assumption is required to continue - one that could send the implementation in the wrong direction. Escalate only when genuinely blocked without a reasonable inference. Document all assumptions made without escalating.
